name: Bally's Corp
summary: PART I Ballys Corporation, a Delaware corporation, with global headquarters in Providence, Rhode Island, is referred to as the Company, Ballys, we, our or us. Our common stock is traded on the New York Stock Exchange (the NYSE) under the symbol BALY. Our Company We are a global gaming, hospitality, entertainment and technology company with an expanding international footprint across casino, interactive and lottery markets.
